get.summary: Serve a file for inline display
get.description: Serves a specific file by its ID for inline display in the browser (e.g., images, PDFs).

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Signed access token generated by the server (valid for 24 hours).

parameters.name: download
parameters.description: Optional flag; when true the file is served with attachment disposition to force download.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The database ID of the file.

schema.description: File stream for inline display.

403.description: Forbidden - Access to the file is not allowed.

schema.description: Forbidden - Access to the file is not allowed.

404.description: Not Found - The file record or physical file does not exist.

schema.description: Not Found - The file record or physical file does not exist.
Internal Server Error.

post.description: Uploads a single file using multipart/form-data. The file will be stored and a database record created.

schema.description: File uploaded successfully.

id.description: The ID of the uploaded file record.

name.description: The stored name of the file.

size.description: The size of the file in bytes.

mimetype.description: The MIME type of the file.

path.description: The storage path of the file.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid input, unsupported file type, or empty file.

schema.description: Bad Request - Invalid input, unsupported file type, or empty file.

413.description: Payload Too Large - File exceeds maximum allowed size.

schema.description: Payload Too Large - File exceeds maximum allowed size.
Internal Server Error.
File not found.
